ddls:
CREATE TABLE "usage_data" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the usage record */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the usage occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the usage record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the usage record */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Holiday indicator (0 for non-holiday, 1 for holiday) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0 for Sunday, 6 for Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Working day indicator (0 for non-working day, 1 for working day) */,
  "weather_situation" INTEGER /* Weather situation (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the day */,
  "apparent_temperature" REAL /* Apparent temperature considering humidity and wind */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity during the day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the day */,
  "casual_users" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered_users" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of bike rentals for the day */,
  "total_duration_in_minutes" INTEGER /* Total duration of all rentals in minutes for the day */,
  "average_rental_duration" REAL /* Average duration of a single rental in minutes */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by all bikes in the day */,
  "average_distance_per_rental" REAL /* Average distance traveled per rental */,
  "peak_hour_start" TEXT /* Start of the peak hour for bike usage */,
  "peak_hour_end" TEXT /* End of the peak hour for bike usage */,
  "peak_hour_rental_count" INTEGER /* Number of rentals during the peak hour */,
  "off_peak_hour_start" TEXT /* Start of the off-peak hour for bike usage */,
  "off_peak_hour_end" TEXT /* End of the off-peak hour for bike usage */,
  "off_peak_hour_rental_count" INTEGER /* Number of rentals during the off-peak hour */,
  "weather_event" TEXT /* Any significant weather event (e.g., storm, heatwave) that might affect usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_weather_situation FOREIGN KEY ("weather_situation") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., national, local, special event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_situation" TEXT /* Situation of the weather */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "precipitation_amount" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered with the system */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Current membership status of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals made by the user */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the user */,
  "average_rental_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the user's rentals in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the usage record for the rental */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user renting the bike */,
  "rental_start_time" TEXT /* Time the rental started */,
  "rental_end_time" TEXT /* Time the rental ended */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being rented */,
  "docking_station_start_id" INTEGER /* ID of the docking station where the rental started */,
  "docking_station_end_id" INTEGER /* ID of the docking station where the rental ended */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled during the rental */,
  "rental_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "weather_situation_at_start" INTEGER /* Weather condition at the start of the rental */,
  "weather_situation_at_end" INTEGER /* Weather condition at the end of the rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_docking_station_end_id FOREIGN KEY ("docking_station_end_id") REFERENCES docking_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_docking_station_start_id FOREIGN KEY ("docking_station_start_id") REFERENCES docking_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES usage_data ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_weather_situation_at_start FOREIGN KEY ("weather_situation_at_start") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_weather_situation_at_end FOREIGN KEY ("weather_situation_at_end") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., in use, available) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the bike */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Current location of the bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was manufactured */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service performed on the bike */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals the bike has been involved in */,
  "total_distance_traveled" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the bike */,
  "average_rental_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the bike's rentals in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES docking_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "docking_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each docking station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the docking station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the docking station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the docking station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the docking station is located */,
  "total_rentals_started" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals that started from this station */,
  "total_rentals_ended" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals that ended at this station */,
  "average_rental_duration" REAL /* Average duration of rentals that started/ended at this station */,
  "average_bike_availability" REAL /* Average number of bikes available at the station */,
  "average_bike_utilization" REAL /* Average utilization rate of bikes at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_data" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the bike */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the bike */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location data */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the bike at the recorded location */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the bike at the recorded location */,
  "is_moving" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the bike is moving (0 for stationary, 1 for moving) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_data_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)
